title: RUSSIA / TRAPPED REALITY
description:
TRAPPED REALITY
Short Stories from Moscow

Events I stumbled into.

The Short Stories from Moscow are mental exercises on art, on the happenstances of daily life and on the identity of man in the streets of Moscow. 
In Russia there is too much of everything: too much sky, too much earth, to much beauty, to much drama...

filmed on site in Moscow

a handmade Da Vaz production 1998
